overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk bar with atmospheric green and red neon lighting. The player walks through the main floor with red booth seating, ascends a graffiti-covered stairwell, explores an upper level pool hall, and enters a restricted back room. The environment features industrial aesthetics with exposed ceilings, pool tables, and dense atmospheric haze typical of the Cyberpunk 2077 game engine.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main bar area, passing red vinyl booths and approaching the back wall

notable_agents.action: patron in yellow shirt standing near the back wall

entered.detail: large illuminated red sign with white text reading CIRRUS and a star logo
semicircular red vinyl booth seating with wooden tables
long bar counter with stools and neon green lighting underneath
rotating ceiling fan with lights hanging from exposed industrial ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the main floor of a cyberpunk bar bathed in green neon light. The camera moves forward past red vinyl booth seating on the left and a long bar counter on the right. A few patrons are scattered throughout, including a person in a yellow shirt standing near the back wall. The atmosphere is hazy with visible smoke or fog effects.

events.description: approaching and beginning ascent of metal staircase to upper level
lighting shifts from green neon to warmer yellow tones in the stairwell

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal grate staircase, passing walls covered in graffiti and murals

entered.detail: industrial metal grate stairs with black railings leading upward
wall with large yellow graffiti text reading PNDRE SABE and RUIN
large painted mural of a skull with a crown and dripping paint

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the main bar floor into a narrow stairwell. The space is enclosed with metal grate stairs and walls covered in colorful graffiti including a prominent skull mural. The lighting shifts from neon green to a warmer, dimmer yellow as the character ascends toward the upper level doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level pool hall with neon lighting

events.description: entering upper level pool hall with multiple pool tables and red neon accents

agents.ego_description: walking around the upper pool hall, navigating between pool tables and seating areas

notable_agents.action: patron holding a pool cue standing near the table
person sitting in red booth near the bar counter

entered.detail: green felt pool table with overhead lighting and balls arranged for play
structural column wrapped in glowing red neon lights
decorative skull mounted on the wall with red lighting
doorway covered with black beaded curtains marked with red NO ENTRY signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious upper level pool hall illuminated by red and green neon lights. Multiple pool tables are arranged throughout the space, with patrons scattered around either playing or sitting in booths. The camera explores the area, passing red neon-lit pillars and decorative skull wall art, eventually approaching a beaded curtain doorway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: restricted back room behind beaded curtain

events.description: passing through beaded curtain doorway into restricted back room
beginning descent down stairs in the back room

agents.ego_description: passing through the beaded curtain into a small red-lit back room, then approaching and descending a staircase

entered.detail: red illuminated sign reading NO ENTRY above the beaded curtain
large poster on the wall advertising a fighting match with two figures
metal staircase leading downward into darkness

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes through a beaded curtain marked with a red NO ENTRY sign into a restricted back room. The space is intensely lit with red light and features a fighting match poster on the wall. The character moves toward and begins descending a metal staircase leading to a lower level, leaving the pool hall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk bar that transitions from a hazy main floor to a restricted upper-level sanctuary. It begins by gliding past red vinyl booths and a long bar counter under a wash of green neon light and atmospheric smoke. As the camera moves forward, the open space narrows into a graffiti-covered stairwell where the lighting shifts to a dim yellow while ascending toward the upper floor. The scene then expands into a spacious pool hall illuminated by red and green neon, passing by pool tables and decorative skull art before approaching a beaded curtain. Finally, the camera pushes through a red NO ENTRY sign into an intensely red-lit back room, moving toward a metal staircase that leads further down into the depths of the building.
